heading: Discrimination in secondary markets prohibited
label: 1087–4 Discrimination in secondary markets prohibited
text: The Student Loan Marketing Association (and, if the Association is privatized under , any successor entity functioning as a secondary market for loans under this part, including the Holding Company described in such section) shall not engage directly or indirectly in any pattern or practice that results in a denial of a borrower’s access to loans under this part because of the borrower’s race, sex, color, religion, national origin, age, disability status, income, attendance at a particular eligible institution, length of the borrower’s educational program, or the borrower’s academic year at an eligible institution.section 1087–3 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1087–4, , as added , , , provided for criminal penalties, prior to repeal by , , , eff. . See .Pub. L. 89–329, title IV, § 440Pub.
